creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Guido Falsi from comment #2)
> Committed, with minor changes.
> 
> I also removed the dirrms, which are now deprecated. pkg now knows how to
> automatically remove directories under PREFIX as needed.
> 
> It has been documented in thee porter's handbook:
> 
> https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/plist-
> cleaning.html


I was not aware of that.

Thanks!
